feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP ECC LIS tables (S861, S851, S852, S853) equivalent table in S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise us on SAP ECC LIS tables (S861, S851, S852, S853) equivalent table in S/4HANA Private Cloud.

 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: AVC_API to extract dependency related information from characteristics from SAP S4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise whether there is a way to extract dependency related information from characteristics from SAP S4HANA Private Cloud through a Standard API.

Please advise. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: How to create new transaction code with authorization AP or AR Ageing Report in sap.
entry.content:
Hi Guys

I have created t-code AP or AR Ageing report in sap s/4hana private cloud and assigned in se93 it was working t-code but here i am facing what authorization we will give to that t-code AP or AR Ageing report

please help me if any one knows 

Regards

Sukumar N

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

entry.title: How to Trigger a PPF action to Print Handling unit label from fiori/API
entry.content:
Hi members,

My requirement is a web API where we need to trigger a PPF to Print Handling Unit Label and to create a spool for each request that is processed and also, we need to have the reprint option also.

Please let me know how I can achieve it and if you can share anything related references.

Thanks,
Bharath

entry.title: Two processing rules would match a bank statement item, what happens then?
entry.content:
Question was raised by a colleague, what would happen if I have two rules in my system, processing rule with id 872 and two conditions, like company code and house bank account. 

And another one with id 873 with two conditions, like company code and external transaction.

Now we import a bank statement, and it contains an item which would fulfills both rule conditions. 

What happens now with the bank statement item?

entry.title: Error Message for Posting Date Outside Scheduled Dates in Process Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need assistance with configuring our SAP system to display an error message when confirming a process order if the posting date is not within the scheduled start and end dates.

We want to ensure that users cannot confirm a process order if the posting date falls outside the scheduled start and end dates of the order by an error message should be triggered during the confirmation process ( using transaction COR6N) if the posting date is not within the scheduled start and end dates.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

SAP S/4HANA MAN Production Planning (PP) SAP Industry Process Framework

entry.title: Upload customer with BP Group Int num range & customer with Ext num range in Data Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have a requirement to map BP group as Internal number range and customer account group as External number range and upload using Data Migration Cockpit. 

We are using SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edition. 

We have issues in mapping the BP number range and customer number range in Data Migration cockpit template.

 

Please advise, 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hello Dears, 
My client has a Pain point that when products are produced, representative comes first has edge to load quantity he wants with no considerations for another Reps . He needs to constrains this by SAP System but not by quantity he need it by percentage. He does not want product allocations as follows if for example he produces 1000 pcs daily 
Dist.Channel 1 : 500 PCS
Dist.Channel 2 : 300 PCS 
Dist.channel 3 : 200 PCS 

Production is not a fixed quantity daily , so he needs it to be for example: 
Dist.channel 1 : 50 % 
Dist.channel 2 : 30 % 
Dist.channel 3 : 20 % 

so does anything in SAP Standards fit this requirement ?

@

entry.title: I need to add an additional us gaap ledger during a move ECC to a S/4HANA private cloud
entry.content:
Dear community members,

A customer of mine is about to move from its ECC system to a S/4HANA Private Cloud, and asked me if it is possible to add an US GaaP ledger in addition of its local ledger.

Anyone already faced this issue ?

Thanks for support 

BR

entry.title: additional reporting currency
entry.content:
Dear community members,

I need to add an additional reporting currency during a move ECC to S/4HANA (group currency). Anyone already came along this question ?

Many thanks support

BR

entry.title: Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX
entry.content:
Hi Experts

System: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud.

We are trying to trigger the SOAP API CO_EDI_ORDER_CONF_REQUEST for Sales Order Confirmation as an EDI output, this is an outbound scenario to send Sales order confirmation from SAP S/4HANA (Private Cloud) to SAP Integration Suite which will further map the message and send to 3rd party system.

but encountering an issue where the service is not being called, we are getting this error in the output processing,

Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX

  • The Logical port has been created in SOAMANAGER
  • NACE configuration has been done to configure the respective program and form routine as per SAP documentation. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/19d48293097f4a2589433856b034dfa5/cf829dd7c1ef4eb08eca4575c2e518ff.html

In Debugging via program RSNAST00:

The code is trying to determine provider applications (technical receiver) in the below code, which fails and this error is thrown, any idea how and where to maintain the provider application/technical receiver?

Any documentation link will be helpful.

 

Thanks

Deepak

entry.title: Contract pricing for use in both Sales and Service
entry.content:
Hi all, Can a Service order or service quote also reference a sales contract? The background to my question is that we would have one contract with the customer with price agreements covering services and service parts. The same part could be sold in a straight-forward spare parts sales order without any connection to the service department, or it could be used in a service or repair order. In both case it needs to apply the same price agreement.

Can this be achieved through a single contract document, or would we need to create 2 documents: 1 sales contract, and 1 service contract with the same content for those parts that could be referenced by either?

Thank you

Patrick

entry.title: Difference between S/4HANA private cloud vs S/4HANA on-premise
entry.content:
As most people say, S/4HANA private cloud is almost similar to on-premise edition except that the private cloud solution is managed by SAP. What are the other major differences that we need to take into account for? (e.g., topics like security, how to expose custom oData service and how to authenticate, etc.)

With public cloud, when exposing a web API, we usually create the communication arrangements/scenario/system/users. Do we have the same functionality in S/4HANA private cloud edition?

Even though the S/4HANA private cloud is managed by SAP, is it still considered as "on-premise"? Where should the cloud connector software be installed?

entry.title: Financial Document (Letter of Credit) FTR_CREATE further processing in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise on the steps to be followed for Letter of Credit (L/c) Financial Document processing in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud. 

we had created Financial document using t-code FTR_CREATE and assigned in Sales Order. However we could not further enable settings/configuration regarding Financial Document (L/c) validity check and value check in further subsequent process. 

Also please advise on how the below configuration is done in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud. 

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: EBRR: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer project - Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Event-Based Revenue Recognition: Support for imminent-loss handling for fixed-price customer projects and project-based sales, has been delivered with S/4 Public Cloud 2408.

A French customer of mine has this requirement for the Private Cloud. I am not seeing this in the RoadMap explorer. Do you know if/when this functionality will be available in the Private Cloud?

Thank you,

Christine

entry.title: Standard Workflows in Production Planning and Quality Mangement in Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Can help me with standard list of workflows available for Production Planning ( Process industry )  and Quality management ? If not available what are eaiset tools is available for it ?

entry.title: Hi! I'm looking for the Learning Journey for S/4HANA Private, Sourcing and Procurement
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for the Learning Journey for S/4HANA Private, Sourcing and Procurement:

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-sap-s-4hana-sourcing-and-procurement

The link into the Cdertification is not valid, the url doesn´t exist!

 

Thank you all.

Carol.

entry.title: The Last Changed date on Purchase Order Items is not updated
entry.content:
Hello!

 

We would like to confirm one thing.

In our private cloud system, we have noticed that when a purchasing document status becomes "Fully Delivered" by the receipt of goods, the last changed date of the Purchase Order Items is not updated accordingly. Is this a standard behaviour that the date is not updated by the change of the status?

Thank you in advance,

Regards

Fujita

entry.title: Highlights of Cloud ERP two-tier Confluence Event – Blog collection
entry.content:
@prakash_karkihallimath @Chandrashekhar_Tipre @eramma_palki @aruna_ayalasomayajula 

We are excited to share highlights of Cloud ERP Two-tier Confluence Event through this blog series.

 

Reflecting on the event, we delved into an overview, master data integration, various sales office scenarios and recent innovations. This blog series aims to help users better understand Two-tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Two-tier ERP addresses groups of companies including headquarters and subsidiaries. It comprises a headquarters ERP with high landscape complexity and being highly customized, and a subsidiaries ERP to support quick scale at lower costs with low landscape complexity. Both headquarters and subsidiaries ERP are integrated in a hybrid landscape with suitable implementation and process optimizations

Check below blog links to know updates from each of the areas

  • Two-tier ERP Overview
  • Two-tier ERP Master Data Replication Options
  • Two-tier ERP Transactional Data Replication options 
  • Sales Office scenarios in Two-tier ERP 
  • Two-tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408

To know more click on " What is two-tier ERP? " page on sap.com

You can also reach out two-tier ERP community for more clarifications

Stay tuned for in-depth posts on each topic

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA_Letter of credit processing
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

Could you please advise on the steps to be followed for Letter of credit processing through TRM module Trade Finance Integration with SD module. 

Our requirement is to link the Letter of Credit document in sales order and have the control in Delivery and Billing based on Letter of credit (L/c) value and validity.

Please advise 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas
